title: NSDL Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NSDL Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
NSDL Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSDL Asia Pacific Associates:
NSDL Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDL Asia Pacific Associates!
